scope: wave2 fan-out migration: positions and pipelines are single-request-sequence Tier-1 endpoints; candidates is a per-position sub-resource fan-out read (one HTTP request per position id, discovered by first paginating positions) that the declarative dialect has no primitive for — see docs.md Known limits.

excluded.reason: sub-resource fan-out: legacy issues one request per position id discovered from a prior full positions read and stamps the enclosing position_id onto each candidate row — a StreamHook-shaped multi-request traversal the declarative dialect cannot express (ENGINE_GAP); Tier-2 hooks are out of scope for this wave
